base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of msx_enemies_dungeon_set — a character from 1986 dragon quest. MSX dungeon enemies — cave/castle random encounters: skeleton/knight/lizardman/werewolf/scorpion/kappa/dragon/dragonlord. 477×563 RGBA canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
